title: Senior Instructional Designer at Arena Animation

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Arena Animation
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
